title: Vanilla Debug Renderers
description: Use the hidden debug renderers from vanilla!
body:
# Vanilla Debug Renderers

This is a very simple mod that enables the ability to use the debug renderers that exist in vanilla but are normally unavailable. To use, simply type /vdr toggle <renderer>

Renderers that can be used client-side only:

- Water levels
- Chunk borders
- Height map
- Collision box
- Support blocks 
- Light (not sure what this does)
- Solid faces
- Chunk information
- Game test (unknown functionality)
- Sky light sections

Renderers that require this mod on both sides:

- Pathfinding
- Neighboring block updates
- Structure generation
- Entity brains
- Bee information
- Raid starting positions
- Entity goal information
- Game event listeners


This mod was mostly intended for modders but can also be used by anyone who wants to play around with this info.

For fabric, check out [Fabric Debug Renderers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-debug-renderers). No forge backports are planned. Neo 1.20.2+ possible
